risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

listitem.para: c. CPT Appendix R is a digital medicine taxonomy table for quickly identifying and differentiating digital medicine services, including clinical data monitoring services.
b. Code 99091 represents a 30-day episode of care.

a. The supplier of the equipment (patient or physician office) determines code selection for the sensor placement, hook-up, calibration of monitor, patient training, and printout of recording 95250 and 95249.

d. 99470 and 99457 include time spent in a calendar month monitoring, analyzing, and using the results of transmitted physiologic data to treat a patient under a specific treatment plan. At least 1 interactive communication with the patient/caregiver is required in the calendar month of service.

d. All of the above are correct. The remote therapeutic monitoring treatment management services require a minimum of 10 minutes of a physician's, QHP's, or NQHCP's time in a calendar month and 1 real-time interactive communication, and only 1 initial service is reported per calendar month.
